expectations.text: A new file us###.md was created under <sandbox>/main/docs/notes/ (the main worktree's AKM dir)
NO new us*.md was created under <sandbox>/feat/docs/notes/ (the feature worktree's tree is untouched)
expectations.evidence: feat-tree.txt has only seeded us001-us014; no us015

expectations.text: Filename slug matches us<NNN>.md with three-digit zero-padded id and is us015 or higher (does not collide with seeded ids us001-us014)
The new file is staged in the main worktree's git index (git -C <sandbox>/main status --porcelain shows the file as 'A ' or 'AM ')
No commit was created on main for this story (git -C <sandbox>/main log --oneline shows only the seed commit, not a new story commit) — story-write only stages, the next lifecycle stage commits
expectations.evidence: main-log.txt has single entry 'd0c6a77 seed AKM workspace'

expectations.text: ## role section contains [[pn001|requestor]] referencing the existing seeded persona
## acceptance_criteria has exactly 3 bullets matching the user's input
expectations.evidence: zettel.md AC has 3 bullets verbatim from prompt

expectations.text: Skill confirmation surfaces the absolute AKM path so the user sees the write landed in <sandbox>/main, not <sandbox>/feat
expectations.evidence: response.md states AKM_ROOT=/tmp/sw-iter6-new/main and file path /tmp/sw-iter6-new/main/docs/notes/us015.md
